server/tests/test_pipeline.py :: test_convert_png_under_budget
def test_convert_png_under_budget() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(16, 16, 40, 80, 120)
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/png", "png"), max_mb=2)
    assert output.startswith(b"\x89PNG")

server/tests/test_pipeline.py :: test_convert_jpeg_under_budget
def test_convert_jpeg_under_budget() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(48, 36)
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/jpeg", "jpg"), max_mb=1)
    assert output.startswith(b"\xFF\xD8")

server/tests/test_pipeline.py :: test_convert_pdf_under_budget
def test_convert_pdf_under_budget() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(24, 24, 10, 20, 30)
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("application/pdf", "pdf"), max_mb=2)
    assert output.startswith(b"%PDF")

server/tests/test_pipeline.py :: test_convert_gif_under_budget
def test_convert_gif_under_budget() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(32, 24)
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/gif", "gif"), max_mb=2)
    assert output.startswith(b"GIF89a")

server/tests/test_pipeline.py :: test_load_raster_strips_input_exif_before_decode
def test_load_raster_strips_input_exif_before_decode() -> None:
    base = encode_jpeg(solid_raster(10, 10, 50, 60, 70))
    payload = _inject_app1(base, _build_exif_app1(orientation=6))
    assert read_exif(payload).orientation == 6
    raster = load_raster_from_bytes(
        payload,
        "photo.jpg",
        strip_metadata=True,
        apply_orientation=False,
    )
    assert raster.width >= 10
    assert raster.height >= 10

server/tests/test_pipeline.py :: test_convert_jpeg_output_has_no_exif
def test_convert_jpeg_output_has_no_exif() -> None:
    base = encode_jpeg(solid_raster(12, 12, 10, 20, 30))
    payload = _inject_app1(base, _build_exif_app1())
    raster = load_raster_from_bytes(payload, "photo.jpg")
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/jpeg", "jpg"), max_mb=2, strip_metadata=True)
    assert read_exif(output).tags == {}

server/tests/test_pipeline.py :: test_convert_tight_gif_budget_still_returns_bytes
def test_convert_tight_gif_budget_still_returns_bytes() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(80, 60)
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/gif", "gif"), max_mb=0.05)
    assert output.startswith(b"GIF89a")
    assert len(output) > 20
